clinical_blockers: Children and non-telehealth settings are outside the exact applicability statement.

Broad GI pain alias, bowel-sound and general vital fields, abdominal-mass label, previous-record review, generic clinician plan, generic follow-up, fixed follow-up ranges, PRN wording, and some examination fields remain unsupported.
Diagnosis, differential diagnosis, investigation selection or interpretation, treatment, urgency, and qualified clinician review remain clinician responsibilities.
